utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I just thought it would make me feel good to do something nice for my friend .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , you are amazing .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no ... no ... no . This is amazing .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: A TV as if it appears from nowhere ! That is the dream ! Man , how did you afford this stuff ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_A TV as if it appears from nowhere ! That is the dream !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , you know I am 29 . I mean who needs a savings account .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , you are the best friend anyone has ever had .

utterances.text: You do this , you give me the great advice , and hey listen , I was thinking about what you said yesterday about focusing on one woman , I am gonna do that .

utterances.text: You mean with Casey ?

utterances.text: No ... no ... no , I think I am gonna see how things go with Kathy . She is pretty cool .

utterances.text: Or Casey .

utterances.text: No ... no , Kathy .

utterances.text: Could be Casey .

utterances.speaker: Joey

utterances.text: How bout I fix you two up ?
